templates.title: Nanoparticle plasmonics scattering preview
templates.title_zh: 纳米颗粒等离激元散射预览
templates.natural_language_goal_en: Generate a local preview workflow for silver or gold nanoparticle scattering on a thin film, suggest materials and an open-source adapter path, and do not run external solvers.
templates.natural_language_goal_zh: 为银或金纳米颗粒位于薄膜上的散射问题生成本地预览工作流，推荐材料和开源适配器路径，不运行外部求解器。
default_assumptions: Material constants must be verified before conclusions.
No FDTD solver execution by default.
templates.evidence_boundary: Adapter/material preview only; no scattering spectrum solver result.
next_actions: Confirm particle size, gap, film, and wavelength range.
Review Meep/Gmsh preview artifacts.
Verify metal optical constants before any physical conclusions.

optical_language_summary.material_system: Ag/Au nanoparticle with SiO2/water/air environment preview
optical_language_summary.solver_or_adapter_family: Meep with optional Gmsh geometry preview
optical_language_summary.evidence_boundary: Adapter/material preview only; no scattering spectrum solver result.

templates.title: Thin-film anti-reflection coating
templates.natural_language_goal_en: Design a local preview for a single-layer anti-reflection coating on glass at 550 nm, estimate the quarter-wave thickness, and inspect a wavelength sweep without running solvers.
templates.natural_language_goal_zh: 为玻璃基底上的单层增透薄膜做本地预览设计，目标波长 550 nm，估算四分之一波厚度，并查看反射率随波长变化，不运行外部求解器。
default_assumptions: Single-layer quarter-wave helper before any validated stack model.
templates.evidence_boundary: Sanity-checked preview formulas only; verify material constants and stack physics before conclusions.
next_actions: Confirm coating material/index and substrate index.
Inspect spectrum and quarter-wave helper output.
Use validated thin-film tooling later if physical conclusions are needed.

optical_language_summary.material_system: SiO2/TiO2/Al2O3 preview coating candidates on glass
optical_language_summary.solver_or_adapter_family: local thin-film calculator; future TMM adapter candidate
optical_language_summary.evidence_boundary: Sanity-checked preview formulas only; verify material constants and stack physics before conclusions.

templates.title: Gaussian beam focus preview
templates.natural_language_goal_en: Preview Gaussian beam propagation and thin-lens focusing for a 1064 nm beam, including waist, Rayleigh range, and focused spot estimate without calling external tools.
templates.natural_language_goal_zh: 预览 1064 nm 高斯光束的传播和薄透镜聚焦，给出光腰、瑞利长度和焦斑估计，不调用外部工具。
default_assumptions: No aberration, clipping, or vector-field effects.
templates.suggested_adapter: local Gaussian beam calculator; no solver adapter required
templates.evidence_boundary: Paraxial Gaussian formulas only; not a vector diffraction or full lens validation.
next_actions: Confirm beam waist, wavelength, and focal length.
Inspect Rayleigh range and focused waist estimates.
Use a diffraction or ray-trace solver later if aperture/aberration effects matter.

optical_language_summary.geometry_model: paraxial Gaussian beam plus ideal thin lens
optical_language_summary.evidence_boundary: Paraxial Gaussian formulas only; not a vector diffraction or full lens validation.

templates.title: Slab waveguide single-mode estimate
templates.natural_language_goal_en: Estimate whether a SiN slab waveguide is likely single-mode near 1550 nm, sweep core thickness, and keep the result as a local design-assist preview.
templates.natural_language_goal_zh: 估算 1550 nm 附近 SiN 平板波导是否可能单模，扫描芯层厚度，并保持为本地设计辅助预览。
default_assumptions: Does not solve ridge/asymmetric vector modes.
templates.evidence_boundary: Scalar V-number orientation only; not a mode-solver result.
next_actions: Confirm refractive indices and core thickness range.
Inspect V-number sweep before adapter preview.
Use MPB/Elmer validation only after explicit solver approval.

optical_language_summary.evidence_boundary: Scalar V-number orientation only; not a mode-solver result.

templates.title: Paraxial lens imaging preview
templates.natural_language_goal_en: Preview a simple lens imaging or two-lens relay design using ABCD matrices, then produce a local ray-optics workflow without running Optiland.
templates.natural_language_goal_zh: 使用 ABCD 矩阵预览简单透镜成像或双透镜中继设计，然后生成本地光线光学工作流，不运行 Optiland。
default_assumptions: No aberration, aperture stop, or material dispersion model.
templates.evidence_boundary: First-order paraxial preview only; not ray-trace validation.
next_actions: Confirm focal length, object distance, and lens sequence.
Inspect paraxial image distance/magnification before adapter preview.
Use validated ray tracing later if aberrations or tolerances matter.

optical_language_summary.evidence_boundary: First-order paraxial preview only; not ray-trace validation.

templates.title: Photonic crystal band preview
templates.natural_language_goal_en: Prepare a local photonic crystal band-structure preview workflow for MPB, including lattice/material assumptions and no solver execution.
templates.natural_language_goal_zh: 为 MPB 准备本地光子晶体能带预览工作流，包含晶格和材料假设，不执行求解器。
default_assumptions: Schematic periodic lattice until geometry is reviewed.
No convergence proof or solver run.
templates.evidence_boundary: Adapter preview only; no band solver execution or formal convergence proof.
next_actions: Confirm lattice, material contrast, and k-path.
Inspect MPB preview input before any optional solver execution.
Add convergence criteria before physical interpretation.

optical_language_summary.evidence_boundary: Adapter preview only; no band solver execution or formal convergence proof.

templates.title: Dielectric metasurface preview
templates.natural_language_goal_en: Create a local preview workflow for a dielectric metasurface unit-cell array, suggest materials and adapters, and keep all outputs preview-only.
templates.natural_language_goal_zh: 为介质超表面单元阵列创建本地预览工作流，推荐材料和适配器，并保持所有输出为预览。
default_assumptions: No FDTD solver execution by default.
templates.evidence_boundary: Geometry/material preview only; no metasurface efficiency validation.
next_actions: Confirm phase target, period, and meta-atom geometry.
Inspect material suggestions and adapter preview.
Add solver validation later only with explicit approval.

optical_language_summary.evidence_boundary: Geometry/material preview only; no metasurface efficiency validation.

recommended_next_actions: Use /api/design-requirements/match to map a natural-language goal.
Inspect expected_tool_calls before running an agent session.
Keep outputs preview/design-assist and review missing inputs.
